businesswire.title: Teledyne FLIR OEM Launches Boson SX8, the First NDAA-Compliant 8 µm SXGA LWIR Thermal Camera Module
businesswire.description: GOLETA, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Teledyne FLIR OEM, a business unit of Teledyne Technologies Incorporated, announced the release of the ITAR-free Boson® SX8, the first NDAA-compliant, volume production, uncooled longwave infrared (LWIR) thermal camera module to combine an 8-micron pixel pitch with SXGA (1280 × 1024) resolution.
